channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical News
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Agrees to US Ceasefire Proposal with Israel
item.description: Lebanon's US embassy confirms Hezbollah accepted a US proposal for reciprocal cessation of attacks. The agreement would halt Israeli strikes on Beirut's southern suburbs in exchange for Hezbollah stopping attacks against Israel, with the framework to expand to all Lebanese territories.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US-China hold maritime military safety talks in Hawaii
item.description: The first US-China military communication since the Xi-Trump summit discussed avoiding misunderstandings during encounters between forces. Both sides agreed on the importance of effective communication for front-line forces.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇮🇱 France bans Israeli officials from Eurosatory defence show
item.description: France barred Israeli government representatives from the Paris arms exhibition and restricted Israeli companies to displaying only air defence systems. Israel's defence ministry called it a 'disgraceful decision' that puts France 'on the wrong side of history'.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey emerges as Iran war winner through 'strategic ambiguity'
item.description: Turkey positioned itself as a key regional power and neutral mediator during the Iran war, benefiting from economic bridging and active non-alignment. Experts note Turkey's strategic flexibility has made it 'one of the winners' from regional turmoil.

item.title: 🇺🇳 UN agency blocks Trump official appointment over US arrears
item.description: The International Labour Organization rescinded the appointment of Sheng Li as deputy director-general because the US owes over million in unpaid membership contributions. The post is traditionally held by an American.

item.title: ⚔️ Appeals court rules Pentagon illegally banned transgender troops
item.description: A federal appeals court panel ruled that the Trump administration's policy unconstitutionally expelled transgender service members. The decision allows blocking current troop bans while permitting restrictions on new recruits.

item.title: 🇮🇳 Indian PM Modi Hosts Myanmar Junta Leader Min Aung Hlaing in New Delhi
item.description: Myanmar opposition groups criticized India for hosting the military leader, but India says engagement is the best way forward. This is Min Aung Hlaing's first visit to India since being sworn in as president in April.

item.title: 📉 Bond Market Inflation Warning Creates New Risk for Republicans in Midterms
item.description: Interest rates on 10-year Treasury notes have climbed to 4.44%, up from 3.95% before the Iran war. The bond market is signaling concerns about US debt sustainability, with mortgage rates hitting nine-month highs.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran warns Israeli strikes in Lebanon threaten US ceasefire
item.description: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said the ceasefire with the US is "on all fronts, including Lebanon" and violations on one front constitute violations of the entire agreement. Tasnim news agency reported Tehran may suspend indirect negotiations with Washington.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary PM moves to oust Orbán-era president
item.description: Prime Minister Péter Magyar announced plans to amend the constitution to remove President Tamás Sulyok, who refused to resign after Magyar's landslide election victory. Sulyok was installed by Viktor Orbán's party in February 2024.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Territorial Gains Turn Negative for First Time Since 2023
item.description: Russian monthly territorial gains slipped into negative territory in May 2025 for the first time since 2023, according to DeepState monitoring, signaling potential momentum shift in the Ukraine war despite reported Russian advances.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Warns Northern Israel Residents to Evacuate Amid Beirut Tensions
item.description: Iran's Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters warned residents of northern Israel to evacuate, threatening escalation if Israel continues attacks on Beirut, as diplomatic exchanges with the US appear to stall.

item.title: 🇳🇱 Netherlands Suspends Lebanese Asylum Seeker Returns Over Security
item.description: The Netherlands halted the return of Lebanese asylum seekers citing the "fragile security situation" in Lebanon, as regional conflict continues to destabilize civilian displacement patterns.

item.title: 🛰️ Iran Attacks Have Damaged 20 US Military Sites, Satellite Images Show
item.description: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes on US military positions were more extensive than publicly acknowledged. Satellite imagery reveals damage across multiple sites.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran seeks limited interim deal with US to ease economic pressure
item.description: Iran is pushing for a limited interim agreement with the United States to ease mounting economic pressure and stabilize the domestic situation, while avoiding major concessions on its nuclear program, according to sources and analysts.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia bans aviation fuel exports until November 30
item.description: The Russian government has banned aviation fuel exports until November 30 as Ukrainian drone attacks continue to strike Russian refineries and energy infrastructure.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Deadly explosion at Myanmar village kills dozens
item.description: An unexplained detonation of explosives stored by one of Myanmar's rebel armies has killed dozens in a village, with the search for survivors continuing amid widespread devastation.

item.title: 🇦🇿 BP begins commercial gas production at Azerbaijan's ACG field
item.description: British energy major BP has started commercial production of non-associated gas at the Azeri-Chirag-Gunashli field off the coast of Azerbaijan, expanding Caspian energy exports.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India GDP growth likely eased to 7.2% in first quarter
item.description: India's economic growth likely slowed to 7.2% in the January-March quarter, according to a Reuters poll, as weakening external demand and softer industrial activity offset strong government spending.

item.title: 🇫🇷 France bans Israeli officials from major defense expo
item.description: Israel's Defence Ministry said France banned Israeli government representatives from attending the Eurosatory defense exhibition, highlighting diplomatic tensions as Israel continues operations in Lebanon.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran halts US diplomatic exchanges, threatens Hormuz closure
item.description: Iran's Tasnim news agency said Tehran is stopping message exchanges with Washington and may block the Strait of Hormuz, accusing the US of violating ceasefire commitments.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China drafts sweeping sanctions list targeting 63 tech sectors
item.description: A Chinese research team has compiled a comprehensive sanctions list covering 63 technology sectors, aiming to restrict exports to the US and its allies in response to Western tech curbs.

item.title: 🇯🇵 China condemns Japan's NATO-linked deployment to Ukraine mission
item.description: Beijing accused Tokyo of pursuing remilitarization after Japan deployed officers to NATO's Ukraine assistance mission, raising regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Suspends US Nuclear Talks Over Israeli Strikes in Lebanon
item.description: Iran halted indirect negotiations with the United States after Israel ordered troops to push deeper into Lebanon to battle Hezbollah, complicating diplomatic efforts to end the three-month war. Tehran cited contradictory US positions and continued Israeli attacks as obstacles to progress.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Coast Guard Patrols East of Taiwan in Response to Japan-Philippines Border Talks
item.description: Chinas Coast Guard conducted law enforcement patrols in waters east of Taiwan in response to Japan and the Philippines launching maritime border delimitation talks, in a show of force amid regional tensions.
